arabic:
وعنه عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال‏:‏ ‏
"‏أحب البلاد إلى الله مساجدها ، وأبغض البلاد إلى الله أسواقها‏"‏ ‏(‏‏(‏رواه مسلم‏)‏‏)‏‏.‏

english.narrator: Abu Hurairah (May Allah be pleased with him) said:
english.text: the Prophet (ﷺ) said, "The dearest parts on the face of the earth near Allah are its mosques, and the most hated parts near Allah are its markets.".

chapter.english: The Book of Miscellaneous ahadith of Significant Values
